title: Dasyaulus microphyllus
taxonomy: Dasyaulus microphyllus is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Australia. The plant is a legume, belonging to the subfamily Faboideae. Further classification within the plant's family or subfamily is not readily available. More research is required to determine the plant's full classification.
